payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new because it is the active/current memory for Sam from Goldman. mem_old was filtered because it has been superseded by mem_new, so presenting mem_old as current would risk showing an outdated fact.
payload.decision: Recall returned mem_new because it is the newer, active memory for the resolved Sam-from-Goldman entity. mem_old was not returned as current because it is marked or inferred as superseded by mem_new.

entity_resolution.reason: The query context identifies Sam by the Goldman affiliation, allowing recall to select the current memory tied to that entity/context while excluding superseded alternatives.

payload.intent: Explain a recall/debug decision for Sam from Goldman, specifically why mem_new was returned and mem_old was filtered.

memory_cards.statement: mem_new was selected as the current memory for Sam from Goldman.
mem_old was filtered from current recall because it is superseded and should not be presented as the current fact.

details: Did not present the superseded memory as current.

repair_options: If mem_old was incorrectly marked superseded, remove or revise the supersession link.
If mem_new is incorrect, mark it invalid or superseded and restore the appropriate current memory.
If Sam from Goldman is ambiguous, add stronger entity identifiers or affiliations to distinguish this Sam from others.
